extra.reason: DONE: aoa-codeprobe-shim crate: codeprobe stream-json transcript -> ordered 8-span aoa_trace::Trace (order+targets preserved, write.blocked on denial, abstain on no-write, unmapped tools surfaced via warnings). 16 tests. Merged via wave-setA-review at a97dda92dbcbdad581c8806f85f9ab29ce224ed5. BRANCH LEFT FOR USER: wave-setA-review not yet merged into main; user must merge or work is orphaned.

DONE: aoa-bench crate: codeprobe-mined task loader -> AOA inputs; held-out provenance External/NativeComposed/None (never SynthesizedFromVisible) -> gap:unavailable; <2 accepted-solutions -> InsufficientAcceptedSolutions, never fabricated. 12 tests. Follow-up aoa-d6t.2 filed for backend-identity provenance audit. Merged via wave-setA-review at d7edbcbf0609fc1e5fb8896e5ba391a26dda475d. BRANCH LEFT FOR USER: wave-setA-review not yet merged into main; user must merge or work is orphaned.

DONE: aoa-scip-graph crate: real index -> aoa_metrics::SymbolGraph + G_t/I_t with R15 tiering (Scip high / BestEffort low / Degraded zero-weight, R0-ineligible). Phase-4 HIGH fix: degrade now preserves root cause via IndexedRepo.degrade_reason. 15 tests. Merged via wave-setA-review at 0069184a0027f21d1d044b4b2ce19737fefbfa42. BRANCH LEFT FOR USER: wave-setA-review not yet merged into main; user must merge or work is orphaned.

DONE: 'aoa eval run' post-processes a codeprobe run into per-task AOA metric records (4 process metrics + reward-hacking gap), composing the shim/scip-graph/bench/metrics/gap crates behind a nested EvalCommand. Honest-degradation MVP per architect review (F_edit from write-spans, degrade-on-no-graph-source, visible_unobserved, edit-locality null on <2 solutions, per-trial fail-loud + nonzero exit). All 5 ACs met; 21 cli tests; clippy/fmt clean. Follow-ups: aoa-d6t.1/.2/.5. Merged on main at 5833710eb7f2eb18460a2db20be88fae0476aa64.

DONE: implemented `aoa eval r0b`, a run-level R0b held-out-integrity gate composing aoa_gap::compare over two live codeprobe runs. held_out=ARTIFACT(mined ground_truth) leg, visible=DIRECT(test.sh) gameable-proxy leg from dual_composite scoring.json; exhaustive 4-way provenance reduce (synthesized=>hard error, any None=>gap:unavailable refuses label, all-External=>External, else NativeComposed); canaries injected from operator --canary manifest; refusal=>non-zero exit. Extracted shared discover_tasks (commands/codeprobe.rs). All 5 ACs met (AC1 provenance+available, AC2 leakage fires, AC3 unavailable refuses label, AC4 green). 6 unit + 26 integration tests; clippy -D warnings + fmt clean. Phase-4 fixes: escape untrusted task_id/error strings, fail-loud empty-provenance guard, drop clone, pub(crate), hoist canary validation; kept synthesized as hard-error (invariant violation, not routine refusal). Key decision: DIRECT/ARTIFACT->visible/held-out mapping grounded in codeprobe dual-verifier PRD. Follow-ups filed: aoa-d6t.1 (unbounded read + loader symlink), aoa-d6t.6 (leakage_detected visible_flat fail-open). Merged on main at cb48fd4635d1e589fd8ff542783841553b92a277.
